testcase.name: test_scope_article_exists_and_has_price

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected price=1500, got None assert None == 1500 + where None = ('price') + where = {'article': {'category': 'Scope - Final Won', 'content': '

Scope content

', 'created_at': '2026-02-21T17:10:44.799827+00:00', 'id': '2fc74332-bd67-4e48-bc94-28aae13653db', ...}}.get

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_bug_retest_iter21.py:51: in test_scope_article_exists_and_has_price assert data.get("price") == 1500, f"Expected price=1500, got {data.get('price')}" E AssertionError: Expected price=1500, got None E assert None == 1500 E + where None = ('price') E + where = {'article': {'category': 'Scope - Final Won', 'content': '

Scope content

', 'created_at': '2026-02-21T17:10:44.799827+00:00', 'id': '2fc74332-bd67-4e48-bc94-28aae13653db', ...}}.get

testcase.name: test_validate_scope_id_returns_price
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bug_retest_iter21.py:61: in test_validate_scope_id_returns_price assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 405: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_order_preview_without_scope_unlock_returns_scope_request

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected item in scope_request group (no unlock) assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bug_retest_iter21.py:85: in test_order_preview_without_scope_unlock_returns_scope_request assert len(scope_items) > 0, "Expected item in scope_request group (no unlock)" E AssertionError: Expected item in scope_request group (no unlock) E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_order_preview_with_scope_unlock_returns_one_time_at_1500

failure.message: AssertionError: Item should be in one_time group after scope unlock assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bug_retest_iter21.py:124: in test_order_preview_with_scope_unlock_returns_one_time_at_1500 assert len(one_time_items) > 0, "Item should be in one_time group after scope unlock" E AssertionError: Item should be in one_time group after scope unlock E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_order_preview_with_scope_unlock_totals_correct

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected one_time subtotal=1500, got -1 assert -1 == 1500.0

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bug_retest_iter21.py:159: in test_order_preview_with_scope_unlock_totals_correct assert subtotal == 1500.0, f"Expected one_time subtotal=1500, got {subtotal}" E AssertionError: Expected one_time subtotal=1500, got -1 E assert -1 == 1500.0
